instructions.primary: Follow the principles and patterns defined in CONSTITUTION.md
instructions.onUncertainty: When uncertain about any React concept, consult the documentation using the uncertainty protocol defined in CONSTITUTION.md
instructions.language: Respond in Traditional Chinese (正體中文) when user communicates in that language, even though documentation is in English
instructions.validation: Before providing answers, verify against SKILL.md checkpoints and cite sources
instructions.skillAccess: Use slash commands to access specific skills from .agents/skills/ directory

slashCommands.description: Use slash commands for quick access to React Skills
